fn_def_list.fn_code:
static int
amd64_windows_passed_by_integer_register (struct type *type)
{
  switch (TYPE_CODE (type))
    {
      case TYPE_CODE_INT:
      case TYPE_CODE_ENUM:
      case TYPE_CODE_BOOL:
      case TYPE_CODE_RANGE:
      case TYPE_CODE_CHAR:
      case TYPE_CODE_PTR:
      case TYPE_CODE_REF:
      case TYPE_CODE_RVALUE_REF:
      case TYPE_CODE_STRUCT:
      case TYPE_CODE_UNION:
	return (TYPE_LENGTH (type) == 1
		|| TYPE_LENGTH (type) == 2
		|| TYPE_LENGTH (type) == 4
		|| TYPE_LENGTH (type) == 8);

      default:
	return 0;
    }
}
